name: Okta Newly Created Privileged Accounts
description: Detects privileged Okta accounts created in the last 7 days for expedited review.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login AS account_name, u.created AS created_at FROM okta_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true) AND u.created > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '7 days'
remediation: Confirm change tickets and owner approval for newly created privileged accounts.
